description_long: This is a medium-sized, white ceramic bowl with a glossy finish and a smooth, rounded form. The exterior features a decorative motif of a red bird and a red flower with green leaves, painted in a traditional style, which stands out vividly against the white background. The bowl has a slightly flared rim and a narrower, stable base, typical of serving or rice bowls. The interior is plain white and highly reflective, indicating a well-glazed surface. The bowl appears to be lightweight and suitable for holding food or liquids. There are no visible chips, cracks, or signs of wear, suggesting it is in excellent condition.
description: A glossy white ceramic bowl with a red bird and flower motif, featuring a smooth, rounded shape and a decorative exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain white interior and exterior of the bowl, with no visible decoration.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the red bird and flower motif on the exterior, with the bowl's glossy white surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white surface, with only a hint of the decorative motif visible at the edge.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the red bird and flower motif, as well as the bowl's smooth, reflective finish.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or eating food, such as rice or soup
attribute_decorative_patterns: Red bird and red flower with green leaves painted on the exterior side of the bowl.
